mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lh_notice_details ( notice_id, contract_address, contract_detail_address, apply_start_date, apply_end_date, contact, raw_json, cached_at ) VALUES ( #{noticeId}, #{contractAddress}, #{contractDetailAddress}, #{applyStartDate}, #{applyEndDate}, #{contact}, NULL, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE contract_address = VALUES(contract_address), contract_detail_address = VALUES(contract_detail_address), apply_start_date = VALUES(apply_start_date), apply_end_date = VALUES(apply_end_date), contact = VALUES(contact), raw_json = VALUES(raw_json), cached_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO lh_notice_supplies ( notice_id, `usage`, address, lot_number, area, expected_amount, house_type, household_count, internet_apply_status, map_address, map_url, latitude, longitude, raw_json, cached_at ) VALUES ( #{noticeId}, #{usage}, #{address}, #{lotNumber}, #{area}, #{expectedAmount}, #{houseType}, #{householdCount}, #{internetApplyStatus}, #{mapAddress}, #{mapUrl}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, NULL, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )

INSERT INTO openapi_sync_logs ( job_name, api_name, status, started_at, finished_at, fetched_count, saved_count, error_message ) VALUES ( #{jobName}, #{apiName}, #{status}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt}, #{fetchedCount}, #{savedCount}, #{errorMessage} )
